title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts  - Settings toggles On/Off
feature: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts
scenario: Verify notification and device alert toggles in General > Notifications can be switched On/Off and persist after reopening the tab and restarting the app
steps: 2. Locate the notification toggle and switch it ON.
3. Locate the device alert settings toggle and switch it ON.
4. Reopen the General > Notifications tab and verify both toggles remain ON.
6. Reopen the General > Notifications tab and confirm both toggles still show ON.
8. Switch the device alert settings toggle OFF.
9. Reopen the General > Notifications tab and verify both toggles remain OFF.
11. Reopen the General > Notifications tab and confirm both toggles still show OFF.
13. Reopen the tab and verify all toggles are ON.
14. Restart the app and confirm all toggles persist as ON.
16. Reopen the tab and verify all toggles are OFF.
17. Restart the app and confirm all toggles persist as OFF.
expected: Notification and device alert settings toggles can be switched On/Off, and their selected state persists when reopening the tab and after restarting the app for all scenarios (individual toggles, all ON, all OFF).
